_comment: Sim tuning for the lite_biped leg joints. Same leg actuators as lite_pro, verified against the Robstride manuals: hip pitch/roll + knee = RS06 (peak 36 Nm), hip yaw = RS02 (17 Nm), ankle yaw/pitch = RS00 (14 Nm), ankle roll = RS05 (5.5 Nm). effort_limit is the manual peak torque; armature uses robstride.py per-actuator nominals (sysid pending).
